# Raja Mandi Commercial Rent — Trikon Complex, Agra

> Commercial shops, offices, and godown available for rent at Trikon Complex in Raja Mandi Main Market, Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India. Direct owner, zero brokerage, ready-to-move units.

## About

Trikon Complex is a three-storey commercial building located in the heart of Raja Mandi Market, one of the oldest and busiest shopping streets in Agra. The complex is a short walk from Raja Ki Mandi railway station and within 2 km of Sanjay Place and MG Road.

The owner rents units directly to tenants — no brokers, no commission, no middlemen.

## Contact

- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 88392 69122
- **Email:** rent@trikoncomplex.com
- **Address:** Raja Mandi Main Market, Agra, Uttar Pradesh 282002, India
- **Website:** https://office-shops-godown-on-rent-in-agra.vercel.app

## What is available for rent

### Ground Floor — Retail Shops
- Main-market-facing retail shops with shutter fronts
- 100 to 300 sq. ft. configurations
- Tile flooring, LED lighting, individual electricity meters
- Ready-to-move — move in today
- **Ideal for:** clothing stores, mobile shops, pharmacies, salons, cafes, bakeries, groceries, electronics

### First Floor — Offices
- Finished office cabins with designer interiors
- Wallpapered walls, false ceiling, premium flooring, sliding balconies
- Natural light, suitable for 2 to 8 person teams
- Shared staircase and washrooms
- **Ideal for:** chartered accountants, advocates, doctors, coaching institutes, startups, digital agencies, consultants

### Basement — Godown Storage
- Dry, dust-sealed covered storage
- Shelving and racking already in place
- Wide doorway for loading and unloading
- Secure, lockable area
- **Ideal for:** wholesalers, e-commerce sellers, distributors, inventory backup

## Location details

- **Raja Ki Mandi Railway Station:** ~400 metres (5-minute walk)
- **Sanjay Place Market:** ~2.1 km
- **Agra College:** ~1.3 km
- **MG Road & main eateries:** ~1.8 km
- **Agra Fort Railway Station:** ~3.0 km
- **ISBT Bus Stand:** ~5.5 km
- **Geo-coordinates:** 27.1919° N, 78.0081° E

## Pricing

Rent depends on unit floor, size, and intended use. Security deposit is typically 3 to 6 months of rent. Lock-in period is flexible. Final terms are always discussed directly with the owner — please call or WhatsApp +91 88392 69122.

## Key selling points

- Direct from owner — no brokerage, no commission
- Ready-to-move units — no build-out required
- High daily footfall at one of Agra's oldest commercial markets
- Walking distance from railway station
- Suitable for retail, professional services, and storage
- 12+ rentable units across three floors
- 24x7 access, two-wheeler parking available

## How to enquire or schedule a visit

Call or WhatsApp +91 88392 69122 between 10:00 AM and 7:00 PM, Monday to Saturday. Video walkthroughs are available for outstation enquiries. In-person visits can be scheduled 7 days a week.
